description: Sanitized replay fixture captured from one LLM-guided AutoResearch iteration. Replaying this file does not call an LLM or execute solver experiments.

iterations.research_goal: Capture a compact replay fixture from a multi-iteration LLM-guided AutoResearch run starting from the baseline solver.

reasons: Worst-case evidence points to scarce courier capacity.
Bundle-aware primary assignment can free couriers before duplicate dispatch.
Worst-case evidence points to scarce courier capacity.
Bundle-aware primary assignment can free couriers before duplicate dispatch.

research_decision.hypothesis: The evidence profile identifies scarce_courier_pressure as the dominant failure mode, and the bundle_merge_duplicate family is directly designed to free couriers via merging before duplicate dispatch. The best broad_strategy variant already uses bundle_bias, but a dedicated merge-then-duplicate pipeline may improve worst-case cases further.
reasons: Evidence profile shows scarce_courier_pressure as dominant failure mode with severity 0.85.
bundle_merge_duplicate is the only family targeting scarce_courier_pressure directly via merging before duplicate dispatch.
Broad_strategy sweep already explored bundle_bias but not merge-then-duplicate pipeline.
All 5 seed configs in this family share the same risk-tier duplicate repair, isolating the merge parameter effect.

comparison of merge_min_improvement values (0, -10, -30) on scarce cases
whether bundle_merge_focused (alpha=90, merge_min_improvement=0) outperforms the broad_strategy bundle_bias baseline

notes: Initial strategy plan: Inspect candidate-table statistics and build the configured local case suite.; Load append-only local experiment history from the current agent session.; Infer the dominant local failure mode from proxy metrics, validity, and worst-case evidence.; Run the LLM-selected catalog sweep or stop-search evidence on local cases only.; Export the best local candidate to agent_suggested_solver.py and render a report.; Keep external score chasing outside the agent loop; use robust local evidence as the search signal.
